title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes frontend development tasks to different models: Claude Opus for planning and integrations, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design. The approach composes two flagship models released the same week to optimize for cost and capability tradeoffs.
